docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 45.00 - SERVED AUG-01-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT URBAN, UBE D.B.A. UBE'S ICECREAM SHOP

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPECTOR, MAX RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT URBAN, UBE D.B.A. UBE'S ICECREAM SHOP $150.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $235.00, IN LIEU OF PAYMENT AND AT THE ELECTION OF THE DEFENDANT, DEFENDANT MAY, NOT LATER THAN OCTOBER 1, 2012, REPAIR THE COLOR OF PLAINTIFF'S BICYCLE TO PLAINTIFF'S SPECIFICATIONS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-27-2012 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SPECTOR, MAX AS TO DEFENDANT URBAN, UBE D.B.A. UBE'S ICECREAM SHOP

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-23-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-27-2012 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $350.00 FILED BY SPECTOR, MAX AS TO DEFENDANT URBAN, UBE D.B.A. UBE'S ICECREAM SHOP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-23-2012 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT URBAN, UBE D.B.A. UBE'S ICECREAM SHOP
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT URBAN, UBE D.B.A. UBE'S ICECREAM SHOP

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-27-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-27-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ULOE URBAN--PROVIDER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
